TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tokar Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Tokar a niyaro', 137 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 355 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 332 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 23 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Pangcah/'Amis 88%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 5%. Ira ko picodadan no wawa i niyaro' Kwan-Yin ko-syaw hananay.
S.PHON: to~ukar itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u to~ukar a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u wawa i nijaro~uʡ kwan-jin ko~u-sjaw ħananaj.
S.FORM: Tokar Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Tokar a niyaro', 137 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 355 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 332 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 23 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Pangcah/'Amis 88%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 5%. Ira ko picodadan no wawa i niyaro' Kwan-Yin ko-syaw hananay.
S.PHON: to~ukar itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u to~ukar a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paŋʦaħ/ʡamis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u wawa i nijaro~uʡ kwan-jin ko~u-sjaw ħananaj.
